items.final_wording: Supports concurrent female and male evaluation, duration trying to conceive, menstrual, obstetric, gynaecologic, medical, surgical, medication, lifestyle, sexual, STI, partner, and prior-investigation history.

source.title: Guideline for the prevention, diagnosis and treatment of infertility
source.population: Individuals and couples being evaluated and managed for infertility.
source.setting: Primary, reproductive-health, fertility, and specialist services adaptable to national settings.
source.exclusions: Exact global guidance for infertility history, focused examination, diagnostic evaluation, and person-centred support; requires UAE adaptation and does not directly cover recurrent pregnancy loss as a separate presentation.

exact_location.heading: Chapter 3.1–3.3 — objective, indication, initial consultation, and medical history

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports concurrent female and male evaluation, duration trying to conceive, menstrual, obstetric, gynaecologic, medical, surgical, medication, lifestyle, sexual, STI, partner, and prior-investigation history.

items.rationale: Supports concurrent partner, duration, medical, surgical, medicine, lifestyle, sexual and prior-investigation history for male fertility concern; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Specifies focused female examination including vital signs, BMI, thyroid and pelvic assessment and a clinically selected evaluation including semen, ovulation, tubal, and uterine assessment.

source.title: Guideline for the prevention, diagnosis and treatment of infertility
source.population: Individuals and couples being evaluated and managed for infertility.
source.setting: Primary, reproductive-health, fertility, and specialist services adaptable to national settings.
source.exclusions: Exact global guidance for infertility history, focused examination, diagnostic evaluation, and person-centred support; requires UAE adaptation and does not directly cover recurrent pregnancy loss as a separate presentation.

exact_location.heading: Chapter 3.3 — focused examination and diagnostic evaluation

source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies focused female examination including vital signs, BMI, thyroid and pelvic assessment and a clinically selected evaluation including semen, ovulation, tubal, and uterine assessment.

items.rationale: Supports focused examination and clinician-selected semen and related evaluation for male fertility concern; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Defines female, male, and unexplained-factor evaluation, menstrual-pattern context, ovulation confirmation, reproductive hormones, semen analysis, tubal assessment, and uterine-cavity assessment.

exact_location.heading: Chapter 5.1–5.3 — female, male, and unexplained infertility diagnostic pathways

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines female, male, and unexplained-factor evaluation, menstrual-pattern context, ovulation confirmation, reproductive hormones, semen analysis, tubal assessment, and uterine-cavity assessment.

items.rationale: Supports male-factor and unexplained infertility evaluation context for male fertility concern; no decision is generated.
